nasb.text: But they have done this to fulfill the word that is written in their Law, ‘They hated Me without a cause.’

esv.text: But the word that is written in their Law must be fulfilled: ‘They hated me without a cause.’

cnv.text: 這就應驗了他們律法上所寫的話：‘他們無故地恨我。’

ccb.text: 这是要应验他们律法书上的话，‘他们无故地恨我。’

csbs.text: 不过这是为要应验他们律法上所记载的话：‘他们无缘无故地恨我。’
